message:
🐛 Fix cross-browser Playwright failures on Firefox (#10149)

Root causes:
- Missing data-testid="sidebar-primary-nav" on the sidebar <nav> element
  caused all tests referencing this testid to fail on Firefox (element not
  found). Added data-testid="sidebar-${section.id}-nav" to each nav
  section in SidebarShell, giving primary and secondary sections stable
  test anchors.
- Missing data-testid="sidebar-customize" on the "Add more" button
  caused custom-dashboard tests to fail. Added the testid.
- Clusters heading test used getByRole('heading', {name: /clusters/i})
  which resolved to multiple elements (page h1 + card h3 titles) causing
  strict mode violations on Firefox. Replaced with testid-based locator
  (dashboard-title) for precision.
- smoke.spec.ts used getByText('Clusters', {exact: true}) which cannot
  match the actual sidebar label "My Clusters". Replaced with href-based
  locators for cross-browser reliability.
- Multiple tests had insufficient timeouts (or no timeout) for Firefox,
  which renders slower than Chromium. Added named timeout constants
  throughout.
- RCE vector scan used networkidle without fallback, which hangs on
  Firefox due to persistent WebSocket connections. Added
  domcontentloaded fallback.

Fixes #10134

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
